general.name: General Attention Hook
general.template:
<hook_guidance>
Hook Strategy: High-Impact Statement
Target Audience: {{audience}}
Objective: Stop the scroll immediately within the first 2 seconds by making a bold, relevant promise to {{audience}} regarding {{goal}}.
</hook_guidance>
